textRuns.value: fact_lot_movement (grain: lot-step) is the central fact table, related many-to-one, single direction, to dim_lot (lot_id), dim_product (product_id), dim_equipment (equipment_id), dim_step (step_seq), and dim_date (track_out_date -> Date). dim_lot also relates to dim_date via fab_out, and to dim_product via an inactive relationship on product_id. No bidirectional relationships exist anywhere in the model.
